request_summary: Execute the ResearchOS corpus_building workflow for GNN_PCNA Phase 2. User explicitly requires using ResearchOS MCP/orchestrator only for this research phase. Do not modify model code, do not retrain, do not generate new scientific claims about project results. Deliverable: creat

context_packet.task: Execute the ResearchOS corpus_building workflow for GNN_PCNA Phase 2. User explicitly requires using ResearchOS MCP/orchestrator only for this research phase. Do not modify model code, do not retrain, do not generate new scientific claims about project results. Deliverable: create or populate research_context/ with these files: 00_SOURCE_INDEX.csv, 00_SOURCE_INDEX.md, 01_REFERENCE_PROJECTS.md, 02_DATASETS_AND_SPLITS.md, 03_MODEL_ARCHITECTURES.md, 04_EVALUATION_AND_LEAKAGE.md, 05_PCNA_BIOLOGY.md, 06_MD_VALIDATION.md, 07_BASELINES.md, 08_REPRODUCIBILITY_AND_PROVENANCE.md, 09_FAILURE_MODES.md, 10_PHASE2_DESIGN_RULES.md, 11_OPEN_RESEARCH_QUESTIONS.md, 12_MASTER_SYNTHESIS.md. Requirement: gather and synthesize at least 200 high-quality, meaningful, deduplicated sources with provenance fields DOI/URL/authors/year/journal-or-venue/relevance/category/source-kind. Prioritize peer-reviewed papers, benchmark papers, Nature/Science/Cell/PubMed/arXiv ML papers, official datasets, official GitHub repos, benchmark leaderboards, reproducibility papers, leakage papers, computational biology reviews, MD validation papers, and high-quality implementation repos. Avoid SEO spam and duplicated mirrors. Research categories: cryptic pocket prediction; allosteric pocket prediction; protein binding-site prediction; residue-level graph neural networks; protein graph construction; geometric deep learning for proteins; ESM/protein language models; structural embeddings; graph attention networks for biology; equivariant neural networks; PocketMiner; fpocket; P2Rank; DeepSite; EquiPocket; PGpocket; GNINA; docking; protein dynamics/conformational change; cryptic pocket datasets; protein ML benchmark datasets; data leakage; homolog contamination; sequence-cluster splits; structural similarity splits; apo/holo leakage; OGB benchmark philosophy; reproducibility in computational biology; provenance tracking; AUROC/AUPRC limits; calibration; bootstrap CIs; seed variance; top-k residue recovery; molecular dynamics validation; RMSF/RMSD/DCCM; pocket volume; ligand stability; enhanced sampling/metadynamics; PCNA biology; AOH1996; ATX-101; PIP-box/APIM; DNA replication stress; PCNA cancer biology; PCNA targeting literature; limitations of computational predictions; AI biology overclaiming; invalid protein ML results. Project goal PDF: C:\Users\reshw\Downloads\DOCUMENTS_GNN\BORRA_#1_SARC.pdf. Treat PocketMiner as central reference. Heavily study protein ML leakage, benchmark contamination, split design, homolog overlap, and reproducibility failures. Synthesize field-level consensus, disputed methods, common failure modes, best practices, evaluation standards, dataset standards, reproducibility standards, biological validation standards, and Phase 2 design rules. Final 12_MASTER_SYNTHESIS.md should be a dense but readable scientific intelligence briefing for rebuilding the project with maximum rigor and prediction reliability.

claim_registry.text: PocketGNNXL V3 achieves AUROC 0.8081 on 13 held-out CryptoSite proteins (8 val + 5 test), with AUPRC 0.3441 (6.2× above trivial baseline 0.0557).
disallowed_wording: validated on all proteins; AUROC without specifying N=13
claim_registry.notes: Primary generalization metric. Fine-tuning structures NOT included.
claim_registry.claim_text: PocketGNNXL V3 achieves AUROC 0.8081 on 13 held-out CryptoSite proteins (8 val + 5 test), with AUPRC 0.3441 (6.2× above trivial baseline 0.0557).

_legacy.text: PocketGNNXL V3 achieves AUROC 0.8081 on 13 held-out CryptoSite proteins (8 val + 5 test), with AUPRC 0.3441 (6.2× above trivial baseline 0.0557).
_legacy.disallowed_wording: validated on all proteins; AUROC without specifying N=13
_legacy.notes: Primary generalization metric. Fine-tuning structures NOT included.

claim_registry.text: PocketGNNXL V3 recovers the AOH1996 binding site on 8GLA with mean pocket score 0.8676 (threshold 0.700 → PASS). Recovers ≥20/24 ground-truth residues in 23/59 PCNA structures.
allowed_wording: recovers AOH1996 binding site; mean score 0.8676
disallowed_wording: discovers novel pocket at AOH1996 site (it is the ground truth, not a novel finding)
claim_registry.notes: Ground truth: 24 residues within 6 Å of ZQZ in 8GLA chains A+B only.
claim_registry.claim_text: PocketGNNXL V3 recovers the AOH1996 binding site on 8GLA with mean pocket score 0.8676 (threshold 0.700 → PASS). Recovers ≥20/24 ground-truth residues in 23/59 PCNA structures.

_legacy.text: PocketGNNXL V3 recovers the AOH1996 binding site on 8GLA with mean pocket score 0.8676 (threshold 0.700 → PASS). Recovers ≥20/24 ground-truth residues in 23/59 PCNA structures.

_legacy.disallowed_wording: discovers novel pocket at AOH1996 site (it is the ground truth, not a novel finding)
_legacy.notes: Ground truth: 24 residues within 6 Å of ZQZ in 8GLA chains A+B only.

claim_registry.text: ANM analysis shows the holo PCNA pocket (8GLA) has elevated flexibility vs global (fold-change 1.157, delta +0.300 vs apo 0.857); holo internal DCCM 0.2093 vs apo 0.0995.
allowed_wording: elevated ANM flexibility in holo pocket; fold-change delta +0.300
disallowed_wording: MD-validated pocket opening; confirmed dynamic pocket (requires trajectory evidence)
claim_registry.notes: ANM is normal-mode approximation, not MD. Supports but does not prove dynamic pocket.
claim_registry.claim_text: ANM analysis shows the holo PCNA pocket (8GLA) has elevated flexibility vs global (fold-change 1.157, delta +0.300 vs apo 0.857); holo internal DCCM 0.2093 vs apo 0.0995.

disallowed_wording: validated cryptic pocket; confirmed pocket opening

issue_registry.title: 9B8T chain assignment wrong
issue_registry.description: Chain A in 9B8T is DNA polymerase epsilon, not PCNA. PCNA = chains B/C/D. All 9B8T outputs are biologically incorrect.
issue_registry.fix_required: Re-run inference on 9B8T with chains B/C/D
issue_registry.notes: Do not cite any 9B8T result until regenerated.

_legacy.title: 9B8T chain assignment wrong
_legacy.description: Chain A in 9B8T is DNA polymerase epsilon, not PCNA. PCNA = chains B/C/D. All 9B8T outputs are biologically incorrect.
_legacy.fix_required: Re-run inference on 9B8T with chains B/C/D
_legacy.notes: Do not cite any 9B8T result until regenerated.

source_registry.abstract_summary:
**Source:** PocketMiner paper (Durrant Lab, ~2023)
**Status:** Needs NotebookLM extraction — notes below from paper_notes.md only

--- - GNN trained on CryptoSite dataset (~93 apo/holo protein pairs)
- Graph: residue-level, edges by Cα–Cα distance
- Labels: residues near cryptic pocket in holo structure
- Key result: AUROC ~0.85 on held-out CryptoSite proteins
- Needs NotebookLM extraction: exact architecture (layer type, hidden dim, edge features)
- Needs NotebookLM extraction: exact feature set used

---

actions: Run agents in order: context_source_truth, literature_web, dataset_integrity, leakage_split, research_design, document_knowledge_ingestion, provenance_artifacts, contradiction_hunter, master_orchestrator, paper_claim, metrics_statistics, validation_skeptic, biological_realism, reviewer_collaboration, preprocessing_auditor, scientific_code_review, model_training
Evaluate gates: claim, evaluation, validation, leakage, dataset, preprocessing, code
Block paper writing if claim/validation/leakage gates are not pass.
Reject metrics if dataset, leakage, preprocessing, or code gates fail.
Require explicit MD evidence classification before any validation claim.
Ingest sources through Agent 21 and update source_registry with provenance.
Run contradiction hunter at end of pipeline.
